title: Monogram Font
description: Monogram font for Minecraft with Caxton support
body:
# Monogram Font for Minecraft

This resource pack adds the Monogram font to Minecraft. [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) is supported for better font rendering, but is not required.

Monogram is a free monospace bitmap font, created by datagoblin and licensed under CC0. Visit the author's website for more information, and donate if you like the font: [https://datagoblin.itch.io/monogram](https://datagoblin.itch.io/monogram)
